title: Classic Beef Wellington

steps.title: Sear beef
steps.description: Quickly sear the beef tenderloin on all sides in a hot pan. Let it cool.

steps.title: Make duxelles
steps.description: Finely chop mushrooms and cook until all moisture evaporates.

steps.title: Wrap
steps.description: Layer prosciutto, duxelles, and beef. Wrap tightly in puff pastry and brush with egg wash.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Bake at 200°C for 35 minutes until pastry is golden brown.

storageInstructions: Wrap in foil and refrigerate up to 2 days. Do not freeze once assembled.

reviews.comment: Incredibly rich and perfectly executed recipe. The beef was tender and the pastry stayed crisp. Worth every minute of effort.
doTips: Let the beef rest completely before wrapping
Seal the layers tightly to avoid leaks
dontTips: Don't overcook the beef during searing

reviews.comment: Amazing dish for a special occasion. The flavor combination is excellent, but it requires patience and precision.
doTips: Use mushrooms cooked until completely dry

reviews.comment: Great recipe but definitely not beginner-friendly. My pastry slightly overbrowned, but taste was still excellent.
doTips: Use foil if the pastry browns too quickly
dontTips: Don't leave it unattended in the oven
Don't skip egg wash for shine

steps.title: Sauté aromatics
steps.description: Cook diced onion with curry powder until fragrant.

steps.title: Simmer
steps.description: Add lentils and coconut milk. Simmer for 25 minutes until lentils are soft.

steps.title: Add greens
steps.description: Stir in fresh spinach and cook for 2 more minutes until wilted.

steps.title: Make cream
steps.description: Whip egg yolks with sugar, then fold in mascarpone. Fold in whipped egg whites gently.

steps.title: Dip cookies
steps.description: Quickly dip ladyfingers into cold espresso and layer them in a dish.

steps.title: Layer and chill
steps.description: Alternate layers of cookies and cream. Chill overnight and dust with cocoa powder before serving.

steps.title: Prep rice
steps.description: Cook sushi rice and season with rice vinegar. Let it cool.

steps.title: Mix tuna
steps.description: Chop the tuna finely and mix with sriracha mayo.

steps.title: Roll
steps.description: Spread rice on nori, add tuna and cucumber sticks. Roll tightly using a bamboo mat.

steps.title: Beat eggs
steps.description: Whisk eggs vigorously until completely smooth with no visible whites.

steps.title: Cook slowly
steps.description: Melt butter in a non-stick pan over medium-low heat. Add eggs and stir constantly.

steps.title: Roll and serve
steps.description: When mostly set but still creamy on top, roll the omelette carefully and serve with chives.

steps.title: Slow cook
steps.description: Rub pork with spices and slow cook on low for 8 hours until fork-tender.

steps.title: Shred
steps.description: Remove pork, shred it with two forks, and mix generously with BBQ sauce.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Toast the buns, add a mountain of pulled pork, and top with fresh coleslaw.

steps.title: Chop veggies
steps.description: Cut tomatoes into wedges and slice the cucumber thickly.

steps.title: Combine
steps.description: Place veggies in a bowl, add olives, and top with a whole block of feta cheese.

steps.title: Dress
steps.description: Drizzle generously with olive oil and sprinkle with dried oregano. Do not mix until serving.

steps.title: Marinate
steps.description: Marinate chicken chunks in yogurt and spices for at least 30 minutes.

steps.title: Cook chicken
steps.description: Brown the chicken in a hot pan, then set aside.

steps.title: Make sauce
steps.description: Simmer tomato passata with spices, add the chicken back in, and finish with heavy cream.

steps.title: Preheat oven
steps.description: Preheat your oven to the maximum temperature (usually 250°C).

steps.title: Shape dough
steps.description: Stretch the pizza dough into a round shape on a floured surface.

steps.title: Add toppings
steps.description: Spread tomato sauce, add torn mozzarella, and drizzle with olive oil.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Bake for 10-12 minutes until the crust is golden. Add basil before serving.

doTips: let it cool down a bit

reviews.comment: Really authentic taste, very close to what I had in Naples. Dough texture was perfect after resting overnight.
doTips: Let the dough ferment for at least 12 hours
Use high hydration dough for better crust

reviews.comment: Very good recipe overall, but I found it slightly tricky to get the crust right in a home oven.
doTips: Preheat oven at maximum temperature for at least 30 minutes
Use a pizza stone if possible
dontTips: Don't use cold dough straight from the fridge

steps.title: Grill chicken
steps.description: Season chicken and grill until cooked through. Slice into strips.

steps.title: Prepare greens
steps.description: Chop the lettuce and place it in a large bowl.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Top lettuce with chicken, croutons, and parmesan. Drizzle with dressing.

steps.title: Dice tuna
steps.description: Carefully dice the fresh tuna into small, even cubes.

steps.title: Prepare avocado
steps.description: Dice the avocado and gently mix with lime juice.

steps.title: Season
steps.description: Mix tuna with soy sauce and sesame oil. Plate using a ring mold.

steps.title: Boil pasta
steps.description: Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente.

steps.title: Prepare oil
steps.description: Gently heat olive oil and thinly sliced garlic in a pan until golden.

steps.title: Mix
steps.description: Add red pepper flakes, drained pasta, and a splash of pasta water. Toss with parsley.

steps.title: Toast rice
steps.description: Toast rice in a dry pan, then start adding hot broth ladle by ladle.

steps.title: Add porcini
steps.description: Midway through cooking, add the sautéed porcini mushrooms.

steps.title: Mantecatura
steps.description: Remove from heat, stir in cold butter and parmesan. Shave fresh truffle on top.

steps.title: Mix batter
steps.description: Whisk flour, baking powder, milk, and egg until smooth.

steps.title: Cook
steps.description: Pour batter onto a hot buttered pan. Flip when bubbles form.

steps.title: Serve
steps.description: Stack pancakes and pour maple syrup generously.

steps.title: Butterfly lobster
steps.description: Cut the shell down the back and lift the meat to rest on top of the shell.

steps.title: Make garlic butter
steps.description: Melt butter and mix with minced garlic, parsley, and lemon juice.

steps.title: Broil
steps.description: Brush lobster heavily with butter and broil for 8-10 minutes until meat is opaque.

steps.title: Toast bread
steps.description: Toast the sourdough slice until crispy.

steps.title: Mash avocado
steps.description: Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

steps.title: Poach egg
steps.description: Create a whirlpool in simmering water, drop the egg, cook for 3 mins.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.description: Spread avocado on toast, top with poached egg and chili flakes.

steps.title: Cream butter
steps.description: Beat softened butter with sugar until creamy. Add vanilla.

steps.title: Add dry ingredients
steps.description: Mix in flour until just combined, then fold in chocolate chips.

steps.title: Bake
steps.description: Form dough balls and bake at 180°C for 10-12 minutes. Let cool.

steps.title: Prep pan
steps.description: Heat a cast-iron skillet until it is smoking hot. No oil needed as Wagyu is highly marbled.

steps.title: Sear
steps.description: Sear the steak for exactly 60-90 seconds per side for a perfect medium-rare.

steps.title: Rest
steps.description: Remove from heat, let it rest for 5 minutes, then slice thinly and top with flaky salt.
